name: Litoral Agency Publisher
description: Publishes approved Litoral Agency campaigns to Facebook, Instagram, and Google Business Profile via the operator's logged-in tabs.
homepage_url: __TODO__: production dashboard URL - ops to set once the public Litoral Agency dashboard URL is chosen
privacy_practice_notes: Thin client for the Litoral Agency backend. Only makes network requests to https://litoral.agency/api/extension/* (queue, claim, scheduled-mark). Operator JWT in chrome.storage.sync; telemetry + claimed-campaign + circuit-breaker state in chrome.storage.local. Does NOT collect end-user data, embed third-party analytics, or read/transmit page content - only drives the operator's own logged-in tabs. Permissions: alarms, storage, notifications, activeTab, scripting. Empty host_permissions.
